belier.intro: The New Moon in Cancer darkens the sky, calling your warrior's spirit home to the quiet sanctuary of your inner world. While the Sun in Gemini fills your mind with quicksilver thoughts, this lunar silence asks you to listen to the whispers of your own heart, to the needs of your deepest roots.
belier.love: In love, seek the comfort of a safe harbor rather than the thrill of the chase. This is a time for quiet intimacy, for sharing vulnerabilities, and for understanding that true strength is found in the willingness to be nurtured as much as you nurture.
belier.work: Your professional world may buzz with new ideas, but your most potent work today is done behind the scenes. Fortify your foundations and secure your base of operations; a well-tended root system is what allows the most ambitious projects to eventually flourish.
belier.energy: Your vital fire may feel more like a gentle, glowing ember than a roaring flame today. Do not force the pace, for this is a day for restorative rest, for nourishing your body as you would a precious seed you've just planted.
belier.intuition: Your intuition speaks in the language of feeling and memory, like water flowing over ancient stones. Pay attention to the echoes from your past and the needs of your soul that surface in the quiet, for they hold the map to your future.
belier.mantra: I plant my intentions in fertile, quiet ground.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The dark of the New Moon in Cancer opens a quiet, tender door in your house of communication. Like a seed planted in the fertile soil of a riverbank, your intentions for connection are now taking root. This is a time for heartfelt whispers, not loud declarations, as you nurture the beginnings of a new way of expressing yourself.
taureau.love: Vulnerability becomes your greatest strength in matters of the heart today. Expressing your need for security through gentle words allows others to truly see and care for you. True intimacy is built not on grand gestures, but on the quiet safety of being understood.
taureau.work: Your most valuable asset is not what you own, but the clarity of your thoughts and the warmth of your connections. A new project or idea can be successfully launched with empathetic communication. Let your instincts about people guide your professional decisions, as feelings are facts right now.
taureau.energy: Your vitality is drawn inward, like the tide receding before it turns. Honor this quiet phase by nourishing your body with simple comforts and rest, rather than pushing through resistance.
taureau.intuition: Your intuition speaks through the emotional currents of your daily interactions and immediate environment. Pay attention to the feeling a conversation leaves behind- it holds more truth than the words themselves.
taureau.mantra: My words are seeds for a beautiful new garden.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Sun illuminates your own sign, filling your sails with familiar air, yet the dark New Moon in Cancer pulls the tide inward. This is a day of quiet beginnings, where your brilliant mind is asked to listen to the whispers of your heart. You are planting a seed not in the world of ideas, but in the fertile ground of your own security and self-worth.
gemeaux.love: Witty banter gives way to the deeper language of silent understanding. Today, connection is found not in what is said, but in what is felt and shared without words. Offer a gesture of care, a moment of true presence; this is the currency the heart values most.
gemeaux.work: Your mind may be racing with a dozen new possibilities, but the cosmos asks you to focus on the one that truly nurtures your foundation. Review your resources and ask what truly makes you feel secure. It is time to ground your intellectual gifts in tangible, lasting value.
gemeaux.energy: The New Moon can feel like an exhale, a quiet pause before the next cycle begins. Respect this ebb tide in your own energy and resist the urge to fill every moment with activity. True restoration today comes from stillness and tending to your inner world.
gemeaux.intuition: Your intuition speaks in feelings today, a language your Gemini mind sometimes rushes past. The quiet of this New Moon allows these subtle signals to emerge from the depths. Trust the quiet knowing that settles in your heart when the mind is at peace.
gemeaux.mantra: I plant seeds of value and inner security.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The New Moon rises in your own waters, Cancer, a dark and fertile sky just for you. This is your personal new beginning, a moment to plant the seed of an intention that comes from the very core of your being. With the Sun still in a hidden corner of your chart, this sacred work is done in private, for your eyes only.
cancer.love: In relationships, silence speaks with more truth than a thousand words today. This is a time to nurture the unseen roots of your connections, offering security and presence rather than demanding answers. For the solo Cancer, the most profound relationship to begin is the one with your own receptive heart.
cancer.work: Your professional life is a fallow field, resting before new growth. Resist the urge to push or force an outcome; instead, tend to the emotional foundations of your ambitions. The quiet hunches you feel about your career are the true blueprints for what is to come.
cancer.energy: Your vitality mirrors the slender crescent of the new moon - present, but needing time to grow. Honor this inward pull and do not overextend your reserves; your shell is your sanctuary today.
cancer.intuition: Your intuition is not a whisper today, but the resonant hum of the entire ocean. With your ruling Moon new and at home in your sign, your inner compass is perfectly calibrated to your soul's true north.
cancer.mantra: In the quiet, I plant the seeds of my truth.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: While your ruler the Sun illuminates your social circles, the real story unfolds in private. A tender New Moon in Cancer slips into your house of secrets, asking you to turn inward and listen to the whispers of your soul. This is a potent time for planting a hidden dream, one that needs stillness to germinate.
lion.love: Grand gestures give way to the profound power of vulnerability. The deepest connections are not forged in the spotlight, but in the soft, lunar glow of shared truths. Offer your quiet heart, not a performance.
lion.work: Your most valuable contributions today will emerge from solitude, not the bustling crowd. Step away from the noise to let your intuition guide your next professional move. Your inner knowing is your sharpest tool.
lion.energy: Your solar fire may feel more like a gentle, warming hearth than a roaring bonfire. Honor this call for quietude and restoration. True power is gathering strength just beneath the surface.
lion.intuition: The veil between worlds is thin, and your dreams hold potent messages. Pay attention to the quiet nudges and feelings that arise from your core. Your inner oracle speaks with perfect clarity today.
lion.mantra: My true strength grows in sacred silence.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The sky is a dark, quiet ocean under the New Moon in Cancer. This is not a time for grand plans, but for planting a single, precious seed in the fertile ground of your deepest feelings. While the Gemini Sun keeps your mind sharp and curious, this lunar whisper invites you to nurture a dream that feels like coming home.
vierge.love: Your heart seeks the comfort of a safe harbor today. Vulnerability is not a weakness but a quiet strength, allowing you to build trust from the ground up. Share a silent understanding or a whispered hope rather than trying to analyze every feeling.
vierge.work: Your analytical mind is a powerful tool, but today it works best when guided by your intuition. Begin the project that not only makes sense on paper but also resonates deeply in your soul. True productivity is rooted in purpose, and a new one is quietly sprouting.
vierge.energy: The New Moon asks for a gentle retreat, a drawing inward of your vital force. Honor this call by choosing rest and nourishment over exertion. Your energy is like a deep well refilling in the darkness, so allow it to replenish.
vierge.intuition: Your inner compass is pointing true north, guided by the sensitive tides of the Cancer Moon. Trust the subtle feelings and gut instincts that arise, as they are more reliable than any checklist or spreadsheet today.
vierge.mantra: My intuition nurtures my next practical step.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The sky darkens for a New Moon in Cancer, planting a quiet seed at the very peak of your chart, in the realm of your career and public life. This is not a moment for grand announcements, but for a deep, internal alignment with your professional path. The Gemini Sun encourages you to learn what you need to support this new growth, like a vine seeking the light.
balance.love: Your ruler Venus seeks harmony, and today that harmony is found in emotional honesty. The tender Cancer Moon encourages vulnerability in your partnerships, asking what truly makes you feel secure and seen. It's a day to tend to the roots of your connections, not just the visible blossoms.
balance.work: This New Moon is your private invitation to begin a new chapter at work. Set an intention for a professional life that nurtures you as much as you nurture it. Think of the career you want to build not as a ladder, but as a home for your ambitions and talents.
balance.energy: The New Moon's tide pulls your energy inward, inviting rest and reflection rather than action. You may feel more sensitive than usual, so honor the need for quiet and protect your inner peace.
balance.intuition: Your intuition speaks in feelings today, a deep gut-level knowing about your true calling. Listen to the quiet whispers that arise when you think about your legacy and what you want to offer the world.
balance.mantra: I build a career that feels like home.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The New Moon rises in Cancer, a fellow water sign, creating a deep and silent current just for you. This is a profound emotional reset, a moment to plant a seed of intention in the fertile darkness. With your ruler Pluto moving backward, the invitation is to turn inward and honor the needs of your innermost self.
scorpion.love: Vulnerability becomes a source of strength in your relationships today. The Cancer Moon encourages a quiet, tender intimacy over grand displays. Sharing a silent understanding or a cherished memory can forge a connection far deeper than words.
scorpion.work: While the world buzzes with Gemini's quick-thinking energy, your focus is drawn to the emotional undercurrents of your work. Your gut feelings about projects or colleagues are your most reliable compass. Trust the wisdom that arises from stillness, not from noise.
scorpion.energy: The New Moon can feel like a low tide, pulling your physical energy inward for restoration. This is a time for gentle movement and deep hydration, not for pushing your limits. Listen to your body's need for retreat and quiet.
scorpion.intuition: Your intuition is a fathomless ocean today, its depths stirred by the dark moon. This is a powerful time for scrying into your own soul and listening to the whispers from below. Your dreams and gut feelings are direct messages, guiding your next transformation.
scorpion.mantra: I plant my intentions in the soil of my truth.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The sky darkens for a New Moon in Cancer, pulling your fiery spirit into the deep waters of your inner world. This is not a day for the wide-open road, but for the quiet, hidden chambers of the heart where true transformation begins. A seed of profound emotional honesty is waiting to be planted in the fertile darkness.
sagittaire.love: With the Sun illuminating your house of partnership, conversation flows, but this Moon demands something deeper. It invites a new beginning in intimacy, a shared vulnerability that builds a bond stronger than words. Dare to speak of the things that lie beneath the surface, for that is where true union is forged.
sagittaire.work: Your focus shifts from grand visions to the intricate webs of shared resources and collaborative trust. This is a potent time to set intentions around joint ventures, investments, or debts, seeking security over speculation. True wealth is built on foundations of mutual respect and integrity.
sagittaire.energy: The New Moon is a cosmic exhale, and your usual boundless energy may feel more like a gentle, glowing ember. Honor this call to retreat and recharge, as even the most brilliant fire must draw inward to conserve its strength.
sagittaire.intuition: Your intuition is your most trusted compass today, guiding you through unseen currents. Listen to the whispers of your gut and the symbols in your dreams, for they carry truths from the soul's deepest well.
sagittaire.mantra: In the quiet dark, I plant a seed of trust.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The New Moon rises in Cancer, your opposite sign, casting a tender, silvery light on your house of partnerships. While the Gemini Sun fills your daily life with mental chatter, this quiet lunar pulse invites you to plant a seed in the soil of your most important relationships. This is a day for new beginnings in connection, a silent promise made to another.
capricorne.love: For you, a sign of structure, this watery moon asks for vulnerability. It's a chance to begin a new emotional chapter, not with grand declarations, but with a quiet intention set from the heart. Let the foundation of your connections be rebuilt on a bedrock of genuine feeling.
capricorne.work: Collaboration takes center stage. A new contract or partnership may be initiated now, one that requires more than just strategic thinking- it requires trust. The most productive work you can do today is to listen deeply to a colleague or client, building a bridge of understanding.
capricorne.energy: The emotional tides are high, and this can feel unfamiliar, even draining. Honor the need for quiet introspection rather than pushing through with sheer force of will. Your strength today is found in softness, in allowing yourself to feel.
capricorne.intuition: Your intuition speaks through the mirror of another person. Pay attention to the feelings that arise in your interactions, as they reflect your own inner landscape. As Rumi wrote, 'The lover is a mirror in which you see your own beauty.'
capricorne.mantra: I build connection with vulnerability and care.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The slender crescent of the New Moon in Cancer settles into your house of daily rhythms, bringing a quiet, tender focus to your routines. While the Sun in Gemini sparks your creative mind, this lunar whisper invites you to care for the foundations of your life. With Pluto retrograde in your own sign, tending to these small, daily acts of service is how you rebuild your world from the inside out.
verseau.love: Connection today is less about brilliant ideas and more about a shared sense of comfort and care. The emotional tide is high, asking you to be present with feelings rather than just analyzing them. Show your affection through a nurturing gesture; it will resonate more deeply than any clever conversation.
verseau.work: This is a fertile moment for planting seeds related to your well-being at work. Instead of pushing for a great leap forward, consider what small new habit could bring more emotional sustenance to your daily tasks. A new intention set now, in the quiet, has the power to grow into a supportive structure for your ambitions.
verseau.energy: The sliver of a New Moon suggests your energy is best directed inward for rest and renewal. Your vitality is like a seed just beneath the soil, gathering strength in the dark before it sprouts.
verseau.intuition: Your deepest knowing speaks through the language of feeling and bodily instinct today. Pay close attention to your gut responses, as they are a compass pointing toward what truly nourishes and sustains you.
verseau.mantra: My daily rhythm nurtures my soul.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The tender sliver of a New Moon in fellow water-sign Cancer opens a secret door in your heart. This lunar current flows through your house of creativity and romance, asking what new joy you wish to cultivate. The Sun in Gemini may pull your focus towards home and hearth, but the moon invites your inner child out to play and dream.
poissons.love: Your emotional world is as deep and luminous as a tide pool today. Share your vulnerability; it is not a weakness but a bridge to another's soul. For those seeking connection, let your authentic light be the beacon that guides a kindred spirit to your shore.
poissons.work: Let your work be a form of play, a channel for what truly moves you. Logic has its place, but today, your most potent contributions spring from instinct and heartfelt inspiration. A project that feels like a part of you will flourish more than one that simply checks a box.
poissons.energy: Your energy is fluid, more suited to gentle currents than to crashing waves. Nurture your vitality with activities that soothe your spirit, perhaps by spending time near water or listening to music that feels like a returning home.
poissons.intuition: Your intuition speaks in the language of feeling and image, a dialect you know well. With Pluto reviewing your deepest subconscious, these whispers from within are especially potent. Trust the quiet knowing that arises before the mind has a chance to argue.
poissons.mantra: My heart is the source of my creation.
poissons.author: Sibylle
